action.reasoning: Observation: train.py error: quaternion has no to_matrix(). Need correct yaw extraction and motion probe to determine forward direction and turning sign. Analysis: Essential to correctly map environment's yaw and angular velocity before any controller will work. Decision: Rewrite train.py with robot_yaw() using quaternion components, run forward and turning tests to confirm yaw and sign conventions. Save dummy checkpoint, no eval yet.
